How to link a bank account to a PayPal Business account. Linking accounts let you move money to and from your business's bank account and use as a funding source for making purchases with PayPal. When logged into your PayPal Business account, click Profile on the top right. Then click Add your bank account. Here, you'll see a list of banks. If your bank is on the list, select it. Then enter the username and password you use to bank online, but we don't store this information. Once you log in, your bank account will be instantly linked to your PayPal account. Now your business bank account is linked to your PayPal account. But if your bank is not on the list, or you want to link more than one bank account, click I have a different bank. Choose Checking or Savings. Then enter your account number and routing number. Click Agree and Link. Then verify that the information is correct. To make sure everything is working properly, PayPal will make two small deposits to your bank account. Then, one withdrawal. This process usually takes two to three business days. Check your business's bank account to make sure these transactions occurred. Once you see them, you can complete the confirmation process. Now, log in to your PayPal business account and click Money at the top of the page. Click the bank account you want to confirm. Then select Confirm Bank. Enter the deposit amounts and click Confirm. We'll confirm the amounts and that's it. Your PayPal business account is now linked with your business's bank account.
